creator: gerald@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: feedback->closed

Digging further, I believe my original analysis was leading into the 
right direction but that the real issue was a change temporarily in 
-CURRENT which has been reverted now and that current versions of 
-CURRENT would not expose this any more.  Please advise in case this 
is not the case.  Thanks for the report!
